questions.question: Describe the difference between an adjacency matrix and an incidence matrix in the context of graph representation. Provide an example to illustrate your point.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of adjacency and incidence in graph theory

questions.question: What is the purpose of a circuit matrix in the matrix representation of a graph? Provide a simple example to demonstrate its application.
questions.hint: Relate circuit matrix to circuit detection

questions.question: Compare and contrast the path matrix and the adjacency matrix in terms of their representation of path connectivity in a graph. Provide a brief explanation of when each matrix would be used.
questions.hint: Focus on the difference in representation of path connectivity
